steps.title: Combine like terms on both sides
steps.content:
Add $7x$ to both sides to collect all x terms on the left, and add \$19$ to both sides to collect constants on the right:

$$7x - 19 + 7x = 19 - 7x + 7x$$
$$14x - 19 = 19$$
$$14x = 38$$

steps.title: Solve for x to find the number of solutions
steps.content:
Dividing by 14 gives:

$$x = \frac{38}{14} = \frac{19}{7}$$

We obtained a single numerical value for x. This means the equation has exactly one solution. That matches choice B — B is correct.
